hero.sub:
Locals challenge travelers. Travelers take it on.
You meet IRL, you live the city for real.

join.pickCity:
Pick a city
and jump in
join.authHint: Save your name · unlock profiles · add friends

local.title: Be the local that runs the city
local.tagline: You know the spots. Challenge the locals or the travelers to find them.
bullets: Challenge locals or travelers — food, place, culture or help
Pull people to the spots you love

exploring.title: Take on local challenges anywhere
exploring.tagline: Wherever you land, take on what locals built.
bullets: Take on challenges launched by locals
Find the real spots, recommended by people who live there
Live the city like a local, not like a tourist

how.title: Three steps to meet locals IRL.

steps.title: Pick your side
steps.desc:
Local. You know the city.
Traveler. You want to live it.

steps.title: Launch or take on a challenge
steps.desc: Locals launch food, place, culture or help challenges. Travelers accept the ones they want.

steps.title: Meet IRL
steps.desc:
Chat in a private thread, set the date, and meet in person.
No more tourist mode.

concept.title:
Not another social network.
A reason to meet IRL.
rules: No followers. No feeds. No algorithms.
Locals challenge. Travelers accept. You meet in person.
Real people. Real places. Right now.

seo: Hilads is a real-time social app where locals challenge travelers to discover their city the real way. Take on a food, place or culture challenge from a local in Paris, accept one in Barcelona, or launch your own in Lisbon — Hilads turns every trip into an IRL meet-up. No account needed. Just show up.

repeat.titleGeneric: Your city is live right now.
